⚖️ MAHAMA MOVES TO EXPAND THE SUPREME COURT.

President Mahama has nominated three new justices to Ghana's Supreme Court — Court of Appeal Justices Sophia Bernasko-Essah and Amoako Asante, and former Ghana Bar Association President Tony Forson.

If Parliament approves them, the country's apex court grows from 18 to 21 justices — one of the biggest benches Ghana has had.

The nominations are made under Article 144 of the Constitution. Next stop: parliamentary vetting, where each nominee is questioned before any approval.

(Source: Pulse | Ghanamma | Rainbow Radio | Ghana Eye Report)
#GreaterNews #Ghana #SupremeCourt #Governance

Do you think a bigger Supreme Court is good for Ghana? 👇

President Mahama has nominated three new Supreme Court justices — Tony Forson, Bernasko-Essah and Amoako Asante — a move that would grow Ghana's apex court from 18 to 21. Parliament must vet and approve them. (Source: Pulse/Ghanamma) #GreaterNews #Ghana #SupremeCourt

⛽ FUEL PRICES ARE UP AGAIN — HERE'S WHAT YOU'LL PAY.

From Thursday, petrol is selling for around GH¢14.52 a litre and diesel near GH¢16.00, after the NPA raised its price floors for the second window of July.

Why? Oil marketers (COMAC) point to two things: global crude prices climbing past US$80 a barrel because of the Strait of Hormuz crisis, and the cedi slipping a little against the dollar.

The petrol floor went from GH¢12.79 to GH¢13.28 a litre; diesel from GH¢13.54 to GH¢14.35. LPG moved up slightly too.

For drivers, trotro passengers and traders moving goods, this is the number that touches everything.

(Source: Pulse | Citi Newsroom | Modern Ghana | MyJoyOnline)
#GreaterNews #Ghana #FuelPrices #GhanaEconomy

How is the new fuel price hitting your budget? 👇

⛽ Fuel prices are up. From July 16, petrol sells around GH¢14.52/litre and diesel near GH¢16 after the NPA raised price floors — blamed on the Strait of Hormuz crisis pushing crude past $80 and a weaker cedi. (Source: Pulse/Citi) #GreaterNews #Ghana #FuelPrices

⚽ IT'S THE ONE WE'VE BEEN WAITING FOR — SPAIN vs ARGENTINA. 🏆

The World Cup final is set. Sunday, 7:00pm Ghana time, at MetLife Stadium in New Jersey.

Argentina, the champions, needed two late goals to break England's hearts, 2-1. Spain? Ruthless — a 2-0 win over France, and just one goal conceded in the entire knockout round.

And the headline act: Lionel Messi's likely last-ever World Cup game, up against 19-year-old Lamine Yamal and a Spain team many are tipping to win it all.

Chale, clear your Sunday evening. 🍿

(Source: Al Jazeera | NBC Sports | MLSSoccer)
#GreaterNews #WorldCupFinal #Messi #Football

Who lifts the trophy — Spain or Argentina? Drop your score 👇

⚽ It's set: Spain vs Argentina in the World Cup final, Sunday 7:00pm Ghana time at MetLife Stadium. Messi's likely last World Cup game vs 19-year-old Lamine Yamal's Spain. (Source: Al Jazeera/NBC) #GreaterNews #WorldCupFinal
